title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should focus on fundamentals (security, reliability, cost, performance, maintainability) and use AI agents to generate infrastructure code rather than coding alone. The position emphasizes understanding what to build and why, leveraging AI for speed while reviewing outputs against core engineering principles.
